title: yes pumpkin blur
description: while everyone is doing "no pumpkinblur", no one (probably) has done "yes pumpkinblur"
body:
EN: while everyone is doing "no pumpkin blur", no one (probably) has done "yes pumpkin blur"
This resource pack replaces pumpkin blur with a completely black screen.

RU: пока все делают "no pumpkin blur", никто (возможно) не делал "yes pumpkin blur"
Этот ресурспак заменяет блюр тыквы на полностью черный экран.
